violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinet faces around wok frier require more thorough cleaning.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. - excessive amount of flies inside the truck. Discussed methods and ways to control flies when truck not in use.
